name: What should success look like when trying to show up in ChatGPT answers?
description: Success means accurate mentions for the right questions, not just random visibility.

mainEntity.name: What should success look like when trying to show up in ChatGPT answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: The outcome you want is not just being mentioned, but being mentioned accurately and for the right customer questions. Businesses that do well tend to have clear positioning, answer-first pages, and consistent references elsewhere on the web.
acceptedAnswer.description: Success means accurate mentions for the right questions, not just random visibility.
